content.en:
The Lord of Qingyun continued, "The Innocent Demon Vine is one of the top overlords of the Innocent Abyss, and even the Lord of the Wind Fang of our Wind Fang Island is no match for the Innocent Demon Vine. Previously, there was a good Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor who tried to provoke the Innocent Demon Vine, but it never came out again. The place where the Innocent Demon Vine is located is known as the forbidden area of the Innocent Abyss. "

"The Innocent Demon Vine is so powerful!"

Ye Tian originally thought that the Innocent Demon Vine was just a little more powerful than the Origin Upper Realm, but now it seems that this is not just a little more powerful, but too powerful, and it is a terrifying existence that can kill other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

At this time, the Lord of Qingyun said again: "Actually, the place where the Innocent Demon Vine is located is also a treasure land, if the Innocent Demon Vine is killed, the Innocent Demon Essence bred in its body alone is a priceless treasure. Moreover, there are also unsullied vine stones near the Innocent Demon Vine, and these Innocent Vine Stones help us to improve the origin of the other side. It's a pity that it's too difficult to snatch the Innocent Vine Stone!"

After Ye Tian chatted with the Lord of Qingyun for a long time, they separated.

......

"Innocent vine stone!"

Ye Tian was very interested in this treasure.

Of course, he was more interested in the Innocent Vine, but no one could kill the Innocent Vine, so forget it.

this day.

Ye Tian went to the Innocent Demon Vine again, but this time he didn't approach the Innocent Demon Vine, but wandered around.

Abrupt.

Vines are entwined, but this is not the Unsullied Demon Vine, but a plant called the Unsullied Vine, which should be the descendants of the Unsullied Demon Vine.

The strength of this unsullied vine is not weak, it has the strength of an ordinary Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, but it is not Ye Tian's opponent.

Of course.

Ye Tian didn't think about killing the other party, otherwise he would definitely attract the Innocent Demon Vine.

At this time, he thought of a solution.

"If I make a copy of the body of the Innocent Vine, and then dig up the Innocent Vine Stone as the Innocent Vine, will it be safe?"

As soon as he thought of this possibility, he was ready to give it a try.

He left here first, and then began to copy the body of the Unsullied Vine.

Soon.

An unsullied vine comparable to the Origin Middle Realm was copied.

The Unsullied Vine can move, but the movement speed is very slow, and if the Unsullied Vine wants to cultivate and grow, it must take root in this land and absorb the energy in the earth to grow.

Because of this, the Innocent Vines here, including the Innocent Demon Vine, don't move.

This is the best place for them to grow!

Next.

Ye Tian used this innocent vine to move slowly.

The wisdom of these unsullied vines is not high, and the wisdom of that unsullied demon vine is not estimated to be high.

He was naturally not afraid that this replica body would be discovered, even if the aura and origin of the two unsullied vines were exactly the same, they would not attract attention.

So, he slowly moved like this, approaching the Innocent Demon Vine.

Really.

When he approached the Innocent Vine, the Innocent Vine did not attack it.

Now.

The Innocent Demon Vine continued to cultivate with his eyes closed, and he did not have anything in the Accident Realm.

"The Innocent Vine Stone should be in the ground near the Innocent Demon Vine, I'll dig it and try it. "

Ye Tian manipulated the vines of the Innocent Vine to copy the body one by one into the ground, and began to look for the Innocent Vine Stone.

Little by little, time passed.

Finally, he found the Innocent Vine Stone.

"Found it!"

Ye Tian's vine grabbed an innocent vine stone and returned.

Then he continued to search, and the vines continued to stretch.

As time passed, more and more innocent rattan stones were found by him.

If you're lucky, you can find dozens of unsullied rattan stones in one place.

After some time.

Ye Tian had already obtained a thousand Innocent Vine Stones, so he began to move slowly, left here, handed over these Innocent Vine Stones to his true body, and then quickly fled from here, for fear that he would be caught and killed by the Innocent Demon Vine.

In this case, the efforts of this time will be in vain.

Fortunately, the Innocent Demon Vine still hadn't found it, and he successfully brought these Innocent Vine Stones out.

......

Wind Tooth Island.

Ye Tian came back, and then began to use the Innocent Vine Stone to refine and improve his other origin.

I have to say that the effect of the insulated rattan stone is really good.

With the help of the Innocent Vine Stone, Ye Tian's other side of the origin gradually grew, and his strength was gradually improving.

One Innocent Vine Stone was enough for Ye Tian to cultivate for an Ancient Era.

After a thousand primeval years, these thousand unsullied vine stones were all exhausted.

And at this time, his other origin has grown a lot.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian went to the Innocent Abyss again and obtained more Innocent Vine Stones from the Innocent Vine Replica Body, this time the number of Innocent Vine Stones obtained reached more than 10,000.

But.

It is not easy to obtain the Innocent Vine Stone in the future, and many of the Innocent Vine Stones are under the root system of the Innocent Demon Vine, which is easy to anger the Innocent Demon Vine.

Before, he accidentally touched the Innocent Demon Vine, disturbed the cultivation of the Innocent Demon Vine, and was directly taught a lesson by the Innocent Demon Vine, although he was not killed, but he was also injured.

"These more than 10,000 Innocent Vine Stones are enough for me to cultivate more than 10,000 Ancient Eras, maybe there is hope for me to step into the late stage of the Origin Middle Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Before you know it, more than 10,000 years have passed.

At this time, his cultivation had indeed stepped into the late stage of the Origin Middle Realm.

He went to test it, and the origin of the other side had reached the level of 320,000.

If the other side reaches 100,000, it is the middle stage of the Origin Middle Realm, and if it reaches 300,000, it is the late stage of the Origin Middle Realm, if it reaches 1 million, it is the peak of the Origin Middle Realm, and it is qualified to impact the Origin Upper Realm.

Although he had reached the late stage of the Origin Middle Realm, he was still far from the Lord of the White Capital and the Lord of Qingyun.

The absolute release of their other side origin is close to one million, and it has even reached the level of one million.

In addition, they will also have the supreme technique on the other side, and they have mastered the complete golden body on the other side, and their combat effectiveness is very terrifying.

Ye Tian's only advantage was that he had mastered the middle treasure of the other side, while the lords of the white capital definitely did not have the treasure of the other side.

But even so, his current strength is still a little worse than that of the Lord of Qingyun.

"Now I can get a steady stream of Innocent Vine Stones, even if it is a little more difficult to obtain later, if I look for it slowly, I can still find a lot, and it is not a problem to improve the origin of the other side. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, what he wanted to do most now was not to improve the Origin of the Other Shore, but to find a treasure that could upgrade the Copying Talent.
